reply:
[
  {"source": "Claude Shannon", "targets": {"zh-CN": "克劳德·香农", "zh-TW": "克勞德·香農", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "Pioneer in information theory and AI, referenced for his work on chess-playing computer programs."},
  {"source": "Alan Turing", "targets": {"zh-CN": "艾伦·图灵", "zh-TW": "艾倫·圖靈", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "Renowned computer scientist who proposed the Turing Test for machine intelligence."},
  {"source": "Turing Test", "targets": {"zh-CN": "图灵测试", "zh-TW": "圖靈測試", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "A test proposed by Alan Turing to determine a machine's ability to exhibit intelligent behavior equivalent to or indistinguishable from that of a human."},
  {"source": "John McCarthy", "targets": {"zh-CN": "约翰·麦卡锡", "zh-TW": "約翰·麥卡錫", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "Coined the term 'artificial intelligence' and is considered one of the founding figures of AI."},
  {"source": "Marvin Minsky", "targets": {"zh-CN": "马文·明斯基", "zh-TW": "馬文·明斯基", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "A key figure in the development of artificial intelligence, co-organizer of the Dartmouth workshop."},
  {"source": "Arthur Samuel", "targets": {"zh-CN": "阿瑟·塞缪尔", "zh-TW": "阿瑟·塞繆爾", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "Coined the term 'machine learning' and worked on programming computers to learn and improve at tasks like checkers."},
  {"source": "Hubert Dreyfus", "targets": {"zh-CN": "休伯特·德雷福斯", "zh-TW": "休伯特·德雷福斯", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "Critic of AI, argued that the human mind is not like a computer in his work 'Alchemy and AI'."},
  {"source": "I.J. Good", "targets": {"zh-CN": "I.J.古德", "zh-TW": "I.J.古德", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "Proposed the concept of an 'ultra-intelligent machine' and its implications for humanity."},
  {"source": "AI winter", "targets": {"zh-CN": "人工智能寒冬", "zh-TW": "人工智慧寒冬", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "Periods in AI history when progress slowed, and funding and interest in AI research declined."},
  {"source": "Rajat Raina", "targets": {"zh-CN": "拉贾特·雷纳", "zh-TW": "拉賈特·雷納", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "Co-author of a seminal paper on large-scale deep unsupervised learning using GPUs."},
  {"source": "Andrew Ng", "targets": {"zh-CN": "吴恩达", "zh-TW": "吳恩達", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "AI researcher and co-author of a paper on GPU-based deep learning, also known for his contributions to AI education."},
  {"source": "ChatGPT", "targets": {"zh-CN": "ChatGPT", "zh-TW": "ChatGPT", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": true, "context": "A generative AI model developed by OpenAI, widely recognized for its conversational capabilities."},
  {"source": "Nvidia H100", "targets": {"zh-CN": "Nvidia H100", "zh-TW": "Nvidia H100", "mn": ""}, "category": "Hardware", "do_not_translate": true, "context": "A hardware accelerator designed for AI workloads, particularly generative AI."},
  {"source": "Nvidia H200", "targets": {"zh-CN": "Nvidia H200", "zh-TW": "Nvidia H200", "mn": ""}, "category": "Hardware", "do_not_translate": true, "context": "A next-generation hardware accelerator for AI and machine learning tasks."},
  {"source": "Narrow AI", "targets": {"zh-CN": "狭义人工智能", "zh-TW": "狹義人工智慧", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "AI systems designed to perform a specific task, such as image recognition or voice commands."},
  {"source": "Broad AI", "targets": {"zh-CN": "广义人工智能", "zh-TW": "廣義人工智慧", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "AI systems capable of performing multiple complex tasks simultaneously, like autonomous vehicles."},
  {"source": "Artificial General Intelligence", "targets": {"zh-CN": "通用人工智能", "zh-TW": "通用人工智慧", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "A theoretical AI system that can perform any intellectual task that a human can do."},
  {"source": "Generative AI", "targets": {"zh-CN": "生成式人工智能", "zh-TW": "生成式人工智慧", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "AI systems capable of generating new content, such as text, images, or videos, based on input data."},
  {"source": "Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)", "targets": {"zh-CN": "检索增强生成", "zh-TW": "檢索增強生成", "mn": ""}, "category": "AI/ML", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "A technique combining generative AI with retrieval-based methods to improve accuracy and relevance."},
  {"source": "CPU", "targets": {"zh-CN": "中央处理器", "zh-TW": "中央處理器", "mn": ""}, "category": "Hardware", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "Central Processing Unit, the primary processor in a computer for executing instructions."},
  {"source": "GPU", "targets": {"zh-CN": "图形处理器", "zh-TW": "圖形處理器", "mn": ""}, "category": "Hardware", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "Graphics Processing Unit, used for parallel processing tasks, especially in AI and graphics."},
  {"source": "NPU", "targets": {"zh-CN": "神经处理器", "zh-TW": "神經處理器", "mn": ""}, "category": "Hardware", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "Neural Processing Unit, a specialized processor for accelerating AI tasks, particularly neural networks."},
  {"source": "IPU", "targets": {"zh-CN": "智能处理器", "zh-TW": "智能處理器", "mn": ""}, "category": "Hardware", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "Intelligence Processing Unit, a hardware accelerator for compute-intensive AI tasks, offered by Graphcore."},
  {"source": "Moore's Law", "targets": {"zh-CN": "摩尔定律", "zh-TW": "摩爾定律", "mn": ""}, "category": "Hardware", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "An observation that the number of transistors on a chip doubles approximately every two years."},
  {"source": "Jensen Huang", "targets": {"zh-CN": "黄仁勋", "zh-TW": "黃仁勳", "mn": ""}, "category": "Business", "do_not_translate": false, "context": "CEO of Nvidia, known for his leadership in advancing GPU technology and accelerated computing."}
]
